name: Pocket Zoo
author: Poki
description: Pocket Zoo is a clicker and merge game that lets you collect and discover amazing animals! Tap bubbles to get animals, merge two of the same to create bigger, cooler creatures, and click on them to earn coins. Use your earnings to buy more animals and work your way toward unlocking the largest creature on the island. Travel between islands to uncover new species and expand your collection. Can you become the ultimate zookeeper with a zoo right in your pocket? How to play Pocket Zoo? Click or tap on the bubble to get animals. Click on the animal to earn coins. Click and hold to move animals. Who created Pocket Zoo? Pocket Zoo is created by Playrea. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Pocket Zoo for free? You can play Pocket Zoo for free on Poki. Can I play Pocket Zoo on mobile devices and desktop? Pocket Zoo can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
